name: createAccount
title: Create Account
description: Create a new Convex account with the specified public key. Optionally fund via faucet (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper, max 1 CVM).

accountKey.description: Hex encoded public key (account key) for the new account (0x prefix optional)

faucet.description: Faucet amount in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper). Omit for no funding.

controller.description: Controller for new account. Default '*caller*' (faucet account). Use 'nil' for self-sovereign, or '#ADDR' for a specific address.

address.description: The address of the newly created account

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the account creation failed
